revision.text:
__NOTOC__ __NOEDITSECTION__ '''Welcome to the [https://lti.cs.cmu.edu Language Technologies Institute] HPC Wiki!''' This wiki provides resources and documentation for the LTI's High-Performance Computing (HPC) clusters, tools, and workflows. Explore the sections below to get started! == HPC Assets ==
==== HPC Clusters ==== ; [[BABEL]] : Let's not let this one tip over. ; [[BOSTON]] : Info about the Boston cluster.
==== Babel Sub-groups ==== ; [[CXCSCMU_GroupWiki]] : Chenyan Xiong's group pages. ; [[FLAME]] : Notes and walk-throughs related to the FLAME Center nodes.
== General ==
; [[SSH|Connecting to the Cluster]] : How to request access, log in, and interact with HPC resources. ; [[Slurm]] : Beginner's guide to the Slurm workload manager—submit, manage, and monitor jobs. ; [[Monitoring]] : Basics of monitoring jobs, compute resources, and disk usage with essential tools.
; [[HPC Software]] : List of software available across all clusters and nodes. ; [[HPC Terminology]] : Overview of common HPC terms and concepts. ; [[Tips & Tricks]] : Useful notes for specific scenarios.
== Models and Datasets ==
; [[ClueWeb]] : A large-scale web corpus with billions of pages from the World Wide Web.
; [[Hugging_Face]] : Intro to setting up your environment and using Hugging Face (HF) models and datasets on Babel HPC.
== Misc ==
; [[Efficiency]] : Exploring GPU power efficiency—concepts and practical tips.
; [[Forum etiquette]] : Guidelines for forum members.
== Help ==
; [[Help:Searching]] : Tips and tricks for effective searching.
; [[Help:Editing]] : Short tutorial on editing and contributing to the wiki.
